title: Closure of American bases in Gulf, reparation for attacks: What Iran is demanding in potential truce deal with US
summary_full: Escalating Middle East tensions see Iran setting high demands for a ceasefire with the US, including base closures and reparations. The US, meanwhile, has proposed a 15-point plan via Pakistan, focusing on nuclear and missile programs, with a potential one-month ceasefire and sanctions relief.
